impact: This fixes the repeated SyntaxError/regex preflight failure mode by using simple typed fixtures instead of task-board parsing, while proving the daemon must choose a board-reconciliation task rather than reselect a parked blocked domain task when accepted supersession evidence exists but the task board has not yet been updated.
summary: Replace the fragile task-selection validation helper with a regex-free implementation and add focused supersession recovery coverage for checkbox-132.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 6 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
